mission.title: Install and Configure Argo Rollouts (Argo) on Kubernetes
mission.description: Argo Rollouts is a Kubernetes controller that provides advanced deployment capabilities such as blue-green and canary strategies. Installing Argo Rollouts allows you to manage your application deployments with greater control and safety.

steps.title: Create the Argo Rollouts namespace
steps.description:
First, create a dedicated namespace for Argo Rollouts to operate in. Run the following command:
```bash
kubectl create namespace argo-rollouts
```

steps.title: Install Argo Rollouts using Helm
steps.description:
Add the Argo Rollouts Helm repository and install the chart with the specified version:
```bash
helm repo add argo https://argoproj.github.io/argo-helm
helm repo update
helm install argo-rollouts argo/argo-rollouts --version 1.8.4 --namespace argo-rollouts --create-namespace
```

steps.title: Verify the installation
steps.description:
Check that the Argo Rollouts controller is running properly:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n argo-rollouts
```

steps.title: Expose the Argo Rollouts Dashboard
steps.description:
To access the Argo Rollouts dashboard, you can port-forward the service:
```bash
kubectl port-forward svc/argo-rollouts-dashboard -n argo-rollouts 8080:80
```

steps.title: Configure resource limits for Argo Rollouts
steps.description:
Edit the deployment to set resource limits for the Argo Rollouts controller:
```bash
kubectl edit deployment argo-rollouts -n argo-rollouts
```
In the editor, add the following under `spec.containers.resources`:
```yaml
resources:
  limits:
    cpu: "500m"
    memory: "512Mi"
  requests:
    cpu: "250m"
    memory: "256Mi"
```

resolution.summary: After completing these steps, you should have Argo Rollouts installed and running in the `argo-rollouts` namespace. You can access the dashboard at `http://localhost:8080` and verify that the controller is functioning correctly.
codeSnippets:
helm repo add argo https://argoproj.github.io/argo-helm
helm repo update
helm install argo-rollouts argo/argo-rollouts --version 1.8.4 --namespace argo-rollouts --create-namespace

prerequisites.description: Ensure you have a Kubernetes cluster running and have installed Helm and kubectl.
